title: Fix critical bugs found in codebase audit
description: Comprehensive bug sweep found 23 bugs across daemon, chat system, JetBrains plugin, VS Code extension, proxy, and scripts. 6 critical, 8 high, 9 medium severity. Key themes: race conditions in state management, WebSocket reconnection issues, chat system reliability, and missing error handling.
architectureNotes:
## Key Patterns for Fixes
- StateManager mutex: use `this.writeMutex.runExclusive()` for all file writes
- JetBrains EDT: wrap UI updates in `ApplicationManager.getApplication().invokeLater()`
- Chat JSONL: add per-channel write queues to prevent concurrent append corruption
- Cursor updates: add atomic cursor update method to StateManager

## Priority Order
1. State corruption bugs (B1, B2) — data loss risk
2. Chat reliability (B3, B8, B9, B10, B11) — affects all agent communication
3. Plugin stability (B4, B5, B6, B12, B13) — user-facing crashes
4. Everything else
epicRails: All fixes must include regression tests where possible
Never break existing API contracts — fixes should be backward compatible
JetBrains fixes must be tested FIRST, VS Code second
Run full test suite after each task completion
